final:
module johnson_counter
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000; // Clear counter to 0000
        end else begin
            q <= {~q[0], q[3:1]}; // Rotate and invert the MSB
        end
    end

endmodule
